name: Webview Form Interaction
description: Tests webview embedding with lambda:// scheme: scrolls page, fills form inputs, toggles checkboxes/radios, selects dropdown options — all via JS injection into the native WKWebView.

events.message: --- Assert webview element exists and is visible ---
--- Scroll host page down to see webview ---
--- Fill text input via JS injection ---

events.js: document.querySelector('.focus-input').focus(); document.querySelector('.focus-input').value = 'Hello from event sim';
var inputs = document.querySelectorAll('.focus-input'); if (inputs[1]) { inputs[1].focus(); inputs[1].value = 'Second input filled'; }
var ta = document.querySelector('.focus-textarea'); if (ta) { ta.focus(); ta.value = 'Multi-line text\nfilled by event simulation\nvia webview_eval_js'; }

events.message: --- Scroll webview content down to checkbox section ---

events.js: document.querySelector('.checked-test').scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'});
var cbs = document.querySelectorAll('.checkbox-label input[type=checkbox]'); if (cbs[0]) cbs[0].click();
var cbs = document.querySelectorAll('.checkbox-label input[type=checkbox]'); if (cbs[2]) cbs[2].click();
var radios = document.querySelectorAll('.radio-label input[type=radio]'); if (radios[2]) radios[2].click();
var sc = document.getElementById('check1'); if (sc) sc.click();
var sc = document.getElementById('check2'); if (sc) sc.click();
var r = document.getElementById('radio3'); if (r) r.click();
document.querySelector('.select-test').scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'});
var sel = document.getElementById('select-basic'); if (sel) { sel.value = 'cherry'; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change')); }
var sel = document.getElementById('select-preselected'); if (sel) { sel.value = 'blue'; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change')); }
var sel = document.getElementById('select-many'); if (sel) { sel.value = 'jul'; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change')); }
var sel = document.getElementById('select-optgroup'); if (sel) { sel.value = 'broccoli'; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change')); }
var els = document.querySelectorAll('.placeholder-input'); if (els[0]) els[0].scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'});
var els = document.querySelectorAll('.placeholder-input'); if (els[0]) { els[0].focus(); els[0].value = 'Typed text'; els[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('input')); }
var els = document.querySelectorAll('.placeholder-input'); if (els[1]) { els[1].focus(); els[1].value = 'More text'; els[1].dispatchEvent(new Event('input')); }
document.querySelector('.selection-contenteditable').scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'});

var ce = document.querySelector('.selection-contenteditable'); if (ce) { ce.focus(); ce.innerHTML = '

Edited by event simulation.

This text was injected via webview_eval_js.

'; }
window.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'});
var box = document.querySelector('.hover-box'); if (box) { box.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseenter', {bubbles: true})); box.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover', {bubbles: true})); }

events.message: --- Scroll host page back to top ---
